evidence.snippet: We are a world leader in thermal interface materials which keep electronics cool, along with inductive components preserving signal integrity.

items.notes: Thermal interface materials, EMI shielding materials, microwave absorbers, and inductive components are their core product lines — all materials/components inputs to electronics assemblies including those in drones.

products_categories.notes: Laird Performance Materials is primarily an electronics materials company (EMI, thermal, absorbers). No UXV-specific product lines exist.

headquarters.notes: Current site (laird.com under Qnity) does not state a physical headquarters address. Historical 2012 press releases cite 'St. Louis, Missouri, USA' as dateline for Laird Technologies, Inc., but those lines exceed the 60-word citation cap. North American sales phone +1 (636) 898-6000 carries a Missouri area code.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Laird serves automotive, medical, 5G, AI, consumer electronics, datacenter, industrial, and aerospace/defense markets with materials and components. No UXV-specific product line.

items.name: Thermal Interface Materials
items.product_type: gap fillers, grease, phase change, tape — thermal management for electronics

evidence.snippet: Tflex™ SF16 gap filler delivers industry-leading 16 W/mK thermal conductivity in a non-silicone based formulation, offering design engineers thermal performance without compromising component protection or reliability.

*   *   [Eccosorb™ CV](/products/absorbers/microwave-absorbing-foams/single-layer-foams/eccosorb-cv)
                    The Laird™ Eccosorb™ CV product is a premium quality tapered broadband microwave absorber addressing high angle of incidence free space application.

*   *   [Softzorb™ GDS](/products/absorbers/microwave-absorbing-gap-fillers/softzorb-gds)
            The Laird™ SoftZorb™ GDS gel type elastomer is a soft absorber for gap filling purpose with enhanced performance in coupling reduction in the 18 up to 35 Ghz.

items.name: Enclosure Level EMI Shielding
items.product_type: conductive foam gaskets, fabric-over-foam, EMI tapes, conductive elastomers

readiness.notes: Catalog products sold through global distributors, converters and reps; automated manufacturing capabilities; 'design, develop and deliver' stated on homepage.

unresolved_questions: Current headquarters address under Qnity Electronics not explicitly published on laird.com; historical press releases indicate St. Louis, Missouri but evidence lines exceed citation cap
tagline: Manufactures thermal interface materials, microwave absorbers (Eccosorb™, Q-Zorb™, RobZorb™ families), EMI shielding, and inductive components for defense and aerospace applications. Production-ready across thermal gap fillers (Tflex™ SF16, HR 6.5), form-in-place gaskets, and hybrid RF-absorbing pads. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status not publicly confirmed; no named UAS primes or programs identified in available sources.
